_comment: Pterodactyl Egg — Last Meadow Online. DB lives at /home/container/game.db — auto-persisted by Pterodactyl. Protocol: TCP (HTTP + WebSocket). Forks: change ghcr.io/instax-dutta to your own registry.
name: Last Meadow Online
author: admin@lastmeadow.dev
description: Browser multiplayer boss battler — gather, craft, fight. Persistent SQLite. Built for Discord.

variables.name: Override Port
variables.description: Leave empty to use Pterodactyl-allocated port (SERVER_PORT). Only set if you need to override.

variables.name: Database Path
variables.description: Absolute path to SQLite database file. Must point inside a mounted volume for persistence across restarts.
